name: Antigravity
prerequisites: Antigravity CLI >=1.0.10 installed and on PATH as `agy` (standalone native binary, e.g. ~/.local/bin/agy); `agy --version` prints just the version
Auth via Google OAuth: oauth_creds.json already provisioned under ~/.gemini (login out-of-band, e.g. `agy` first-run browser flow). No API key env var needed
Drive the REPL via tmux (send-keys + capture-pane), never human-in-the-loop; one agy process maps to one conversation
Cost/token accounting is NOT in the JSONL transcript (only in per-conversation SQLite protobuf blobs) — token/cost scenarios (5.x) are deferred/unavailable for v1
